text: The surgeon introduces an endo bag into the peritoneal cavity as the initial step in the laparoscopic in-bag cystectomy procedure for a dermoid cyst.
The surgeon opens the endo bag within the pelvis and carefully places the entire dermoid cyst inside the bag, preparing for laparoscopic cystectomy.
The surgeon makes an incision along the anti-ovarian border of the ovary and gently peels the dermoid cyst away from the cyst wall, carefully separating it from the surrounding tissue.
After completing the cystectomy, the surgeon opens the cyst wall inside the endo bag, revealing sebaceous content and hair being expressed from the cyst.

The surgeon ensures that all cyst contents remain contained within the endo bag. The endo bag is then carefully removed from the peritoneal cavity, completing the surgical procedure without any spillage into the surrounding area.
